services.title: Entra app discovery
services.summary: List tenant app registrations and diff vs config (JSON on stdout). Use --section entra|compute|all.

services.title: Entra app deploy
services.summary: Create managed app registrations missing from the tenant (--section entra).

services.title: Entra app maintain
services.summary: Reconcile redirect URIs and API permissions for managed apps (--section entra).

services.title: Azure compute deploy
services.summary: Provision Azure VMs / ACI with cost confirmation (--section compute).

next_steps: Run `hdc run infrastructure azure query -- --section all` after deploy or maintain.
Entra bootstrap: `query -- --section entra --import --yes` to refresh entra/applications.
Compute: `hdc run infrastructure azure query -- --section compute --live`.
Grant admin consent in Entra portal when required_resource_access changes.
